message.content:
@startuml
title Melihat Surat BKD
actor AdministratorBKD
participant "Dashboard_V" as Dashboard_V
participant "SuratBKD_V" as SuratBKD_V
control "Admin_C" as Admin_C
control "BKD_C" as BKD_C
entity "SuratDisposisi_E" as SuratDisposisi_E

Admin_C -> Dashboard_V: 1 load->view()
Dashboard_V --> AdministratorBKD: 2 Halaman Dashboard
AdministratorBKD -> Dashboard_V: 3 klik menu Surat BKD
Dashboard_V -> BKD_C: 4 index()
BKD_C -> SuratDisposisi_E: 5
SuratDisposisi_E --> BKD_C: 6
BKD_C -> SuratBKD_V: 7 load->view()
SuratBKD_V --> AdministratorBKD: 8 Halaman Surat BKD
@enduml
